diagnosis: The player completed the level in 194.5 seconds with 3 deaths and 9 hits taken, all from combat rather than falls, indicating fair but engaging difficulty. The trace shows extensive exploration and backtracking across multiple vertical tiers connected by ladders, with the player revisiting areas repeatedly before finding the correct path upward. Despite the non-linear traversal, the player rated the experience 5/5 and explicitly praised enemy diversity, suggesting the combat variety compensated for navigation ambiguity.

lessons.lesson: High enemy variety and fair combat encounters can compensate for unclear critical paths in vertical layouts, maintaining player engagement despite backtracking.
conditions: multi-tier vertical layout with multiple similar ladders
no visual signposting for critical path
diverse enemy types distributed across tiers
combat deaths feel fair rather than unavoidable
lessons.outcome: player explores extensively, backtracks repeatedly, but rates experience highly due to enjoyable combat variety

save_reason: Standout level with 5/5 rating, fair combat challenge (3 deaths, 9 hits), and praised enemy diversity despite navigation ambiguity.
